title: aws-sm: put() field selector still returns Backend not InvalidUri
description: put() with field selector (line 161 in secretx-aws-sm/src/lib.rs) still returns SecretError::Backend. The x68.1 fix only updated the test assertion — the implementation was never changed. Test is integration-gated so the mismatch is never caught by cargo test. When run against real AWS the test will fail.
